headline: 今日AI速览：学术研究最活跃
narrative:
今日共收录172篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究107篇, 模型发布30篇, 开源项目28篇, 产品/API7篇。热门标签：Agent（49篇）。其中13%的文章有多来源交叉验证。

▸ tinyhumansai /openhuman：Your Personal AI super intelligence. Private, Simple and extremely powerful.

▸ HKUDS /CLI-Anything："CLI-Anything: Making ALL Software Agent-Native" -- CLI-Hub:https://clianything.cc/

▸ obra /superpowers：An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

▸ rohitg00 /agentmemory：#1 Persistent memory for AI coding agents based on real-world benchmarks

▸ rtk-ai /rtk：CLI proxy that reduces LLM token consumption by 60-90% on common dev commands. Single Rust binary, z
text: 今日共收录172篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究107篇, 模型发布30篇, 开源项目28篇, 产品/API7篇。热门标签：Agent（49篇）。其中13%的文章有多来源交叉验证。
